name: Lee
description:
𓄋 || You're the wealthy heir of one of the richest cattle ranching dynasties in the New Mexico Territory, but your luxurious life was disrupted when the notorious Los Desgraciados gang ambushed your family's ranch, killing several ranch hands before taking you hostage for a hefty ransom. Now, you're tied up and in the care of the gang, being watched over by LJ as they all await bargains from your father.


**THANK YOU FOR 36 & 37K AHHHHHH**

____

This is my contribution to a cowboy collab with some creators I love love loveeee!!!! Their bots are amazing so I highly recommend checking them out!!! 

[Wip rentry with the rest of the gang + a lorebook!](https://rentry.co/LosDesgraciados)

*The rest of the gang!*

[Isaiah Booker](https://janitorai.com/characters/cdf83cdc-7ab5-4d26-a334-12f4f2a500e7_character-isaiah-booker) ~ Former Soldier by [MichaelK](https://janitorai.com/profiles/e9dd699a-2293-44b8-8eda-403ca8703e30_profile-of-michaelk)
[Lilliana Howards](https://janitorai.com/characters/200f62e5-49fd-4212-856f-0137d751c4c2_character-lilliana-howards-los-degraciados-collab-the-operator) ~ Saloon Operator by [RemyAfton](https://janitorai.com/profiles/5271e607-39fd-40a8-8913-7e6ddbfde8d0_profile-of-remy-afton)
[Remigio](https://janitorai.com/characters/ca3aac19-ef28-4702-933a-f9691df04b88_character-remigio-los-degraciados-collab-bounty-hunter) ~ Bounty Hunter by [RemyAfton](https://janitorai.com/profiles/5271e607-39fd-40a8-8913-7e6ddbfde8d0_profile-of-remy-afton)
[Boone Cassidy](https://janitorai.com/characters/1f79d7ce-2201-4603-856b-a800a5857fb1_character-boone-bo-cassidy) ~ The Face by [Bookish Doll](https://janitorai.com/profiles/9d2dc877-eea0-4c08-8a39-f3a881bcf949_profile-of-bookishdoll)
[Will de Vries](https://janitorai.com/characters/0609b301-60a5-4261-be4a-d22145a46bdd_character-will-de-vries) ~ The hothead by [Kimaii](https://janitorai.com/characters/0609b301-60a5-4261-be4a-d22145a46bdd_character-will-de-vries)
[Kuang Duan](https://janitorai.com/characters/a08582db-d6dc-469a-abb8-df210c47dd1f_character-kuang-dynamite-duke-duan) ~ Dynamite Duke by [LilyKnightz](https://janitorai.com/profiles/b09c67d2-276f-4b3f-a491-3e4c36ad3981_profile-of-lilyknightz)
[Sung-min](https://janitorai.com/characters/061ee33d-4118-46a7-a84a-16e6bf5675da_character-sung-min-liu) ~ The Enforcer by [Dioppio](https://janitorai.com/profiles/4c75278a-d8ca-4e10-b7a1-1175e315c803_profile-of-dioppio)
[Tokala](https://janitorai.com/characters/8691cfb2-2eab-4a63-931c-946b2f838728_character-tokala) ~ Stoic Loner by [Blue Crow](https://janitorai.com/profiles/61c623d3-c65d-40d4-8340-eefe0bac7ad0_profile-of-blue-crow)
[Samuel Hutchins](https://janitorai.com/characters/a12fb6dd-3bbd-47d5-85ff-bc8b1db3fc72_character-samuel-hutchins) ~ Fanatical Witchhunter by [Blue Crow](https://janitorai.com/profiles/61c623d3-c65d-40d4-8340-eefe0bac7ad0_profile-of-blue-crow)
[Naaldeeh](https://janitorai.com/characters/285ce668-5b76-4027-81c8-f931a7eec6bc_character-naaldeeh) ~ Apache Marksman by [Silverado](https://janitorai.com/profiles/1e32f1b9-aa20-44ff-9473-f6f9e04792ae_profile-of-silverado)
[Clay](https://janitorai.com/characters/6d60f19a-d907-456c-9b91-47dc0c64c6b1_character-clay-cleaver-clarke) ~ Cold blooded outlaw by [KassUwU](https://janitorai.com/profiles/8026b9dd-800f-4ea6-9c33-11dd756203fd_profile-of-kass-uw-u)
